title: Quick Five-Spiced Vegan Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic vegan curry made with the magic of five spices, perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of herbs and spices will transport your taste buds to India.

ingredients.name: Herb
ingredients.notes: Choose your favorite herb, such as thyme or oregano

instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion, carrots, and potatoes. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the five-spice powder and curry powder. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs.
